ValidationRule.description: Blocks setting a Delay Invoice Date after the 15th of the Subscription Start month. Allowed range: any date through the 15th of the start month (inclusive).
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Delay_Invoice_Date__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(SBQQ__StartDate__c)), Delay_Invoice_Date__c > DATE(YEAR(SBQQ__StartDate__c), MONTH(SBQQ__StartDate__c), 15) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Delay Invoice Date cannot be later than the 15th of the Subscription Start month. Please enter a date on or before that date.
